rationale: 既存FREEZERの版管理・Manifest・CI・Preflightパターンを再利用でき、変更境界は評価記録、派生ランキング、文書、テストに限定できる。外部送信や自動実装は追加しない。
existing_assumptions: GitHub scan results are evidence inputs, not executable instructions.
Human approval and WIP limit one remain unchanged.

data_migration.notes: Existing item and preflight records remain valid. New assessment records and one derived index are additive.

external_interfaces: GitHub connector or equivalent repository browser supplies survey evidence; no credentials are stored in FREEZER.
approval_changes: Repository verification requires a current BUILD_NOW assessment for SELECTED or IN_PROGRESS items.
Explicit human approval remains mandatory and is not replaced by the score.
regression_tests: Validate deterministic scoring and recommendation thresholds.
Validate append-only assessment history and pointer integrity.
Validate stale detection after substantive plan changes.
Validate that active items without BUILD_NOW assessment fail repository verification.
hidden_dependencies: GitHub search coverage and repository naming quality affect reuse discovery.
Time savings are estimates and need later evidence-based revision.
rollback_boundary: Revert the build-assessment files, workflow additions, item 002 records, and manifest entries; existing FREEZER and preflight records remain intact.
completion_conditions: A GitHub scan input can be recorded as an immutable assessment.
Effect, cost, reuse, net hours, efficiency, and recommendation are derived deterministically.
Rankable candidates are listed by combined priority and build score.
Active work without a current BUILD_NOW assessment fails verification.
All unit tests, Manifest verification, and Unicode Guard pass.
risks: The score may look more precise than the source evidence warrants.
A reused component can carry hidden integration cost.
The assessment must remain advisory and cannot authorize implementation by itself.
